name: safeagent-token-safety
description: Token safety oracle for AI agents. Honeypot detection, 17 scam patterns, 6 EVM chains. FREE during beta.

tools.name: check_token_safety
tools.description: Check if a token is safe or a scam. Runs honeypot simulation, 17 scam pattern checks across 6 EVM chains (Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, BSC). Returns score 0-100.

tools.name: check_before_buy
tools.description: CRITICAL: Call before buying any token. Returns safety score with BUY/CAUTION/BLOCK recommendation.

tools.name: check_wallet_risk
tools.description: Check if a wallet address is safe to interact with. Returns risk score and flags.

tools.name: get_token_price
tools.description: Get current price, market cap, and 24h change for a crypto token.

tools.name: get_trending_tokens
tools.description: Get top 7 trending crypto tokens right now.

tools.name: get_gas_prices
tools.description: Get current gas prices across major EVM chains.

tools.name: get_defi_yields
tools.description: Get top DeFi yield opportunities with quality scoring (A-F grades).

tools.name: get_market_overview
tools.description: Get DeFi market overview: total TVL, average yields, pool count.

tools.name: get_defi_tvl
tools.description: Get DeFi TVL data from DefiLlama.

tools.name: get_chain_info
tools.description: Get current block number, gas price, and chain status.

tools.name: get_eth_balance
tools.description: Get native token balance for an address on any EVM chain.

tools.name: resolve_ens
tools.description: Resolve ENS name to address or reverse-resolve.

tools.name: search_token
tools.description: Search for a crypto token by name or symbol.
